emails.subject: New Committed Reserves/First Purchaser GTC
emails.body: New Committed Reserves/First Purchaser GTC Hi Gerald, I didn't get a copy of the new Committed Reserves/First Purchaser GTC from you last night. I didn't know you if you forgot or if there was a problem with the email, so I thought I'd ask again. Please let me know if you have any questions. I appreciate your help. SBR x30569

emails.subject: RE: New Committed Reserves/First Purchaser GTC
emails.body: RE: New Committed Reserves/First Purchaser GTC Sorry about the delay. I had to figure out where the IT guy's had moved all this stuff when Shawna departed. Let me know if you have questions. To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: New Committed Reserves/First Purchaser GTC
